vocab.example: I love taking photos of modern suspension bridges as they are a true feat of engineering.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị cản trở
vocab.example: I spent an hour looking for a spot that offered an uninterrupted view of the landmark's spire.
Architecture is the most vital component of the urban landscape when you're doing street photography.
Ancient pagodas are fascinating to photograph because they have managed to stand the test of time.
In this shot, the grand entrance of the museum serves as the primary focal point.
The way the light hits the limestone reveals subtle nuances in the building's texture.
Tourists often crowd around the iconic landmark, making it difficult to get a clean, wide-angle photo.
I view architectural photography as a form of visual storytelling that highlights a city's evolution.
The ornamental features around the window frames are what make these colonial villas so photogenic.

vocab.meaning: tòa nhà chọc trời cao vút
vocab.example: Capturing a soaring skyscraper from a low angle can create a very dramatic and powerful composition.
